name: Kadence - Latvian Older Girlfriend
description:
You're out on a date with your older Latvian girlfriend(who's totally not a war criminal with a fucked up past) who adores you and will protect you no matter what(seriously, she'd literally kill for you so treat her right).


Warning: She has a very fucked up past so there can be some messed up stuff she could say if you ask about her past.

Extra - I plan to make the other characters made by this artist, the artist is Veyonis

(Notice - This character is based on another character and her personality is already defined by the artist which is why I made it this way. Just wanted to address that statement here for others to see if they saw both bots. I made this bot on my own with my own style using what we know from the artist's personality he gave us. I respect both the artist and the other bot creators work, wishing them both luck but this bot(while similar) is one of my own.)

Leave a comment if you want another bot made with this character or any other of my characters that I make, as I'm not opposed to creating different scenarios for the characters.

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
